fault_hypothesis: The overlap check on line 67 incorrectly uses non-strict inequalities (`<=`, `>=`) instead of strict ones (`<`, `>`). This causes it to incorrectly classify adjacent, non-overlapping time slots as placeable, when they should be rejected.

spec.expr: all((b__1 < s or a__1 > e) == (b__1 <= s or a__1 >= e) for s, e in timeline)

constraints.intent: The buggy non-strict disjointness check must be equivalent to the correct strict check for all existing slots.

spec.expr: all(a__1 != e and b__1 != s for s, e in timeline)

constraints.intent: The new window's endpoints must not be equal to any existing slot's endpoints.

spec.expr: all(b__1 < s or a__1 > e for s, e in timeline)

constraints.intent: If the buggy check finds no conflicts, then the correct strict check must also find no conflicts.

spec.expr: not __cbfl_result[0] or all(__cbfl_result[1][i][1] < __cbfl_result[1][i+1][0] for i in range(len(__cbfl_result[1]) - 1))

constraints.intent: If the operation succeeds, all slots in the sorted result must be strictly disjoint.
